style_effects: Flickering translucent violet aura with slow-moving mist particles drifting upward in erratic spirals, casting distorted reflections in the air like shattered glass. Cold blue-white ghostly energy pulses visibly ripple through its ethereal form, illuminating the surrounding darkness with an eerie, pulsating luminescence. The lighting mood is a haunting blend of deep indigo and pale silver, casting elongated, bending shadows that twist unnaturally around its body. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
